summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ViralScout Stage 3. Backend: 22/22 API tests passed including Products CRUD, Alerts, Automation, and Stripe endpoints. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in POST /api/products. Frontend: Demo Mode using localStorage works correctly with dashboard stats, charts, product discovery, admin panel, and automation center. Frontend uses MOCKED localStorage data instead of real backend API.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend runs entirely in Demo Mode using localStorage. Does NOT fetch real data from MongoDB backend APIs. This is expected behavior per design (MOCKED), but limits end-to-end integration testing.
affected_selectors: All data views - Dashboard, Discover, Admin, Alerts, Automation

issues: Recharts width/height console warnings during initial render - charts render correctly after layout stabilizes

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status with database connected
Backend: GET /api/products returns 15+ products from MongoDB with filters working
Backend: POST /api/products creates product with automatic trend scoring, AI summary, and alert generation
Backend: GET /api/products/{id} returns single product, 404 for missing
Backend: GET /api/alerts returns 8+ alerts with stats (total, unread, critical, early_stage)
Backend: PUT /api/alerts/{id}/read marks alert as read
Backend: GET /api/automation/stats returns run statistics
Backend: GET /api/automation/logs returns automation history
Backend: POST /api/automation/run executes full pipeline successfully
Backend: POST /api/automation/scheduled/daily with API key succeeds
Backend: POST /api/automation/scheduled/daily without API key returns 401
Backend: Stripe checkout/portal/cancel endpoints work in demo mode
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero section and 'Start Free Trial' CTA
Frontend: Signup form with Demo Mode banner visible
Frontend: Dashboard displays stats grid (Total Products, Avg Trend Score, High Opportunity, Rising Trends)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Trend Activity area chart and Category Mix pie chart
Frontend: Discover page shows 10 product cards with search and filter controls
Frontend: Admin Panel loads with Products/Users/Subscriptions tabs
Frontend: Admin Panel shows 10 products with scores, stages, and margins
Frontend: Automation Center has 4 quick action cards (Run Scoring, AI Summaries, Generate Alerts, Import)
Frontend: Automation Center has Import, Manual Entry, Automation, Logs tabs
Frontend: Trend Alerts page displays stats (Total, Unread, Critical, Early Stage)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in POST /api/products - added _id deletion before JSON response

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Demo Mode working, but no real backend integration)

seed_data_creation: Backend has 15 products and 8+ alerts seeded in MongoDB. Frontend uses MOCK_PRODUCTS array in productService.js (10 products)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 3 complete. Backend APIs fully functional with MongoDB. Frontend runs in Demo Mode using localStorage (MOCKED - no real backend calls). All automation endpoints work. Stripe endpoints scaffold in demo mode. MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug was fixed.

mocked_apis.Frontend Supabase Auth: MOCKED - Uses localStorage DEMO_USER and DEMO_PROFILE constants in AuthContext.jsx
mocked_apis.Frontend Products/Alerts: MOCKED - Uses localStorage in productService.js (MOCK_PRODUCTS), alertService.js (localStorage)
mocked_apis.Backend Stripe: MOCKED - Returns demo_mode: true when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY not configured

bug_fix_applied.issue: POST /api/products returning 500 error - MongoDB ObjectId not JSON serializable
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: MongoDB insert_one() adds _id field automatically, which is ObjectId type not serializable
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added deletion of _id field from processed dict and alert before returning JSON response
